meta.description: IFRS 9 Stage 2 and Stage 3 (NPL) loan data — 121 banks, 25 EU/EEA countries
meta.notes: Values in EUR billions. Stage 2 ratio = Stage 2 / Total Loans. NPL ratio = Stage 3 / Total Loans. Figures sourced from EBA 2025 Transparency Exercise, EBA RAR Dec 2025, EBA RAR Jun 2025, EBA Q3 2025 Risk Dashboard, and individual bank interim/annual reports. Aggregate calibration: EU/EEA NPL ratio 1.84% at Jun 2025, Stage 2 ratio 9.3% at Q3 2025 (EBA RDB).

latest_eba_aggregate.reference: Q3 2025 EBA Risk Dashboard / RAR December 2025

banks.name: Banco di Desio e della Brianza
